primary_text:
Your beef travelled 2,400km to reach you. It sat in cold storage for up to three weeks. The farmer who raised it earned a fraction of what you paid.

That's the system we inherited. It doesn't have to stay that way.

FarmThru connects 50+ regenerative farms directly to families through a local hub. Fresher food. Fairer prices for farmers. No unnecessary middlemen.

Now you can help build the alternative. Equity crowdfunding on Birchal, July 2026. From $50.

Not financial advice.
headline: The food system can work differently
description: Help build the alternative. Equity crowdfunding on Birchal, July 2026.
creative_brief: Two-frame story. Frame 1: long highway, truck, industrial feel. Frame 2: short farm-to-hub journey, green paddock. Warm transition.
